tasks.instruction: For the soonest upcoming concert in Chicago, add 2 standard tickets priced at or below $60 to your cart.

tasks.instruction: From the merch store, add 2 units of the cheapest black T-shirt in size M that costs under $35 to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Join a fan club membership plan that costs less than $15 per month and lists at least two perks containing the word "exclusive", using monthly billing if available.

tasks.instruction: Add a digital download of the cheapest studio album released between 2018 and 2022 that has at least 10 tracks to your cart.
